keyPoints: Push: Add element to the top of the stack.
Pop: Remove element from the top of the stack.
Peek/Top: Return the top element of the stack without removing it.
IsEmpty: Check if the stack is empty.
Array Implementation: Use an array to represent the stack.
Base Case: The base case in a recursive stack implementation.
Base Size: The initial size of the array in a stack implementation.
Applications: Implement recursive algorithms, parse expressions, and evaluate postfix notation.
